title: poponax pennatula
intro: Poponax pennatula, also known as prickly poppy or desert poppy, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Poponax pennatula include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and soothe skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Poponax pennatula can be made into salves, creams, and tinctures, which can be applied topically to the affected area for relief.
